name: Health Potion
description: A small flask of crimson liquid that mends wounds. Restores 30 HP when consumed.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A larger, more potent healing draught. Restores 70 HP when consumed. A prized commodity deep in any dungeon.

name: Antidote
description: A bitter green tincture that purges poison and other toxins from the body. Cures the poison status effect immediately.

name: Portal Scroll
description: A single-use arcane scroll inscribed with a gate rune. Opens a portal back to town. Cannot be used mid-combat.

name: Mana Potion
description: A shimmering blue vial brimming with arcane essence. Restores 40 mana/resource when consumed.

name: Buff Potion
description: A frothing amber brew that temporarily sharpens reflexes and strengthens muscles. Grants +5 attack for 5 turns.
